---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The need**
What are you trying to do that you can't today?

**Proposed behavior**
What should it do? Reference the [SPEC](../../docs/SPEC.md) area/requirement if one fits (e.g.
`FR-FX-…`), or note if this is new scope.

**Does it fit v1?**
See [ROADMAP](../../docs/ROADMAP.md) and SPEC §13 (out of scope). Is this v1, v1.x, or future?

**Performance / stability impact**
Anything that could affect playback, memory, or stability (SPEC §5)?
